ChatGPT

Pricing

Choose the plan that fits your needs. Flexible options for individuals, teams, and enterprises.

Free

Access basic features with no commitment required.

₹0 / month
  • Single user access
  • Basic support
  • Limited API usage
  • Community resources
  • Access to standard features
  • Monthly usage cap

Have an existing plan? See billing help

Go
New

Upgrade for more usage and priority support.

₹399 / month
  • Everything in Free and:
  • Increased API limits
  • Email support
  • Early access to new features
  • Usage analytics

Only available in certain regions. Limits apply

Plus

Unlock advanced features and higher usage limits.

₹1,999 / month
  • Everything in Go and:
  • Priority support
  • Unlimited API requests
  • Custom integrations
  • Advanced analytics
  • Team collaboration tools
  • Role-based access
  • Dedicated onboarding
  • Extended usage history

Only available in certain regions. Limits apply

Pro

Designed for professionals needing maximum performance.

₹19,900 / month
  • Everything in Plus and:
  • Enterprise-grade security
  • Custom SLA
  • Account manager
  • API priority queue
  • Advanced reporting
  • Unlimited team members
  • Custom branding
  • Integration support
  • On-demand training

Only available in certain regions. Limits apply

Business

Perfect for growing teams and organizations.

  • Annual billing
  • Monthly billing
₹2,099 / user / month billed annually
  • Everything in Plus and:
  • Team management dashboard
  • Advanced permissions
  • Bulk user import
  • Audit logs
  • Priority onboarding
  • Custom integrations
  • Dedicated support

Only available in certain regions. Limits apply

Enterprise

Custom solutions for large organizations and enterprises.

  • Everything in Business and:
  • Custom contract & pricing
  • Dedicated account manager
  • On-premise deployment
  • Compliance & certifications
  • 24/7 premium support
  • Custom onboarding & training

Trusted by teams at

FAQ

Yes, we offer a Free plan with essential features so you can get started at no cost.

Absolutely. You can change your plan at any time, and changes take effect immediately.

If you reach your limits, you’ll be notified and can upgrade to a higher plan to continue.

You can send and receive as many messages as you want without worrying about usage caps.

Yes. Your account syncs across web, iOS, and Android devices automatically.
